name: molecular-weight
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'chem.molecular-weight'; invoked as handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input) with virtualArtifact.data===input. Deterministic pure compute from a static PERIODIC_TABLE; molecularWeight is rounded but always finite and > 0 for any successful parse. Unknown elements and empty/over-length formulas fail-CLOSED with a string error. NOT assassin-driven (not in the MACROS map); authored spec pinned by server/tests/chem-lens-macros.test.js + server/tests/chem-domain-parity.test.js.
